LEVEL_0_POSSESSION.description: Private key control only. No personhood proof.

LEVEL_1_CONTINUITY.description: Cryptographic proof of same-actor continuity across epochs.

LEVEL_2_PERSONHOOD.description: Non-disclosing proof of human uniqueness and stewardship.

evidence_classes.CLASS_D_HEURISTIC: Behavioral or metabolic pattern matching (low assurance).

hold_triggers.PROOF_MISMATCH: Continuity break detected between Epoch N and N-1.
hold_triggers.INSUFFICIENT_ADEQUACY: Action class requires Level 2 Personhood but only Level 0 provided.
hold_triggers.DIGNITY_VIOLATION: Tool requested raw biometric or civil identity data.
